### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile HTTP/1.1
Accept-Encoding: gzip
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1
Connection: close
Content-Encoding: gzip
Content-Type: application/proto
Cookie: REDACTED
Host: api2.cursor.sh
Traceparent: REDACTED
User-Agent: connect-es/1.6.1
X-Amzn-Trace-Id: REDACTED
X-Client-Key: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Checksum: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Client-Arch: x64
X-Cursor-Client-Device-Type: desktop
X-Cursor-Client-Os: win32
X-Cursor-Client-Type: ide
X-Cursor-Client-Version: 2.6.12
X-Cursor-Config-Version: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Streaming: true
X-Cursor-Timezone: REDACTED
X-Fs-Client-Key: REDACTED
X-Ghost-Mode: true
X-New-Onboarding-Completed: false
X-Request-Id: REDACTED
X-Session-Id: REDACTED
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "netprof/report/summary_builder.py",
  "3:LEN": "\"\"\"Build summary.json from flows and transactions.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom collections import defaultdict\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.summary import (\r\n    LatencyPercentiles,\r\n    Summary,\r\n    TopDestination,\r\n    TopTalker,\r\n)\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _percentile(sorted_values: list[float], p: float) -> float | None:\r\n    if not sorted_values:\r\n        return None\r\n    k = (len(sorted_values) - 1) * p / 100.0\r\n    f = int(k)\r\n    c = f + 1 if f + 1 < len(sorted_values) else f\r\n    return (\r\n        sorted_values[f] + (k - f) * (sorted_values[c] - sorted_values[f])\r\n        if c > f\r\n        else sorted_values[f]\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_summary(\r\n    flows: list[Flow],\r\n    transactions: list[Transaction],\r\n    top_talkers_n: int = 10,\r\n    top_destinations_n: int = 10,\r\n    top_ports_n: int = 10,\r\n) -> Summary:\r\n    \"\"\"Compute aggregate stats from flows and transactions.\"\"\"\r\n    total_flows = len(flows)\r\n    total_bytes = sum(f.bytes_client_to_server + f.bytes_server_to_client for f in flows)\r\n    total_transactions = len(transactions)\r\n\r\n    # Top talkers: by IP, aggregate bytes sent/recv (as client or server)\r\n    ip_bytes_sent: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    ip_bytes_recv: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        ip_bytes_sent[f.client_ip] += f.bytes_client_to_server\r\n        ip_bytes_recv[f.client_ip] += f.bytes_server_to_client\r\n        ip_bytes_sent[f.server_ip] += f.bytes_server_to_client\r\n        ip_bytes_recv[f.server_ip] += f.bytes_client_to_server\r\n    talkers = [\r\n        TopTalker(ip=ip, bytes_sent=ip_bytes_sent[ip], bytes_recv=ip_bytes_recv[ip])\r\n        for ip in sorted(set(ip_bytes_sent) | set(ip_bytes_recv))\r\n    ]\r\n    talkers.sort(key=lambda t: t.bytes_sent + t.bytes_recv, reverse=True)\r\n    top_talkers = talkers[:top_talkers_n]\r\n\r\n    # Top destinations: server endpoint (server_ip:port), bytes_sent to it, flow_count\r\n    dest_bytes: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    dest_flows: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        key = f\"{f.server_ip}:{f.server_port}\"\r\n        dest_bytes[key] += f.bytes_client_to_server\r\n        dest_flows[key] += 1\r\n    dests = [\r\n        TopDestination(target=k, bytes_sent=dest_bytes[k], flow_count=dest_flows[k])\r\n        for k in sorted(dest_bytes.keys())\r\n    ]\r\n    dests.sort(key=lambda d: d.bytes_sent, reverse=True)\r\n    top_destinations = dests[:top_destinations_n]\r\n\r\n    # Top ports: destination port, count of flows\r\n    port_count: dict[int, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        port_count[f.server_port] += 1\r\n    top_ports = [\r\n        {\"port\": p, \"count\": port_count[p]}\r\n        for p in sorted(port_count.keys(), key=lambda p: -port_count[p])[:top_ports_n]\r\n    ]\r\n\r\n    # Active flow peaks: max concurrent in any bucket\r\n    active_flow_peaks = 0\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        if f.concurrency_timeline:\r\n            for _ts, count in f.concurrency_timeline:\r\n                if count > active_flow_peaks:\r\n                    active_flow_peaks = count\r\n\r\n    # Latency percentiles from transactions with latency_ms\r\n    latencies = [t.latency_ms for t in transactions if t.latency_ms is not None]\r\n    latencies.sort()\r\n    p50 = _percentile(latencies, 50)\r\n    p90 = _percentile(latencies, 90)\r\n    p99 = _percentile(latencies, 99)\r\n    latency_percentiles = LatencyPercentiles(p50_ms=p50, p90_ms=p90, p99_ms=p99)\r\n\r\n    return Summary(\r\n        total_flows=total_flows,\r\n        total_bytes=total_bytes,\r\n        total_transactions=total_transactions,\r\n        top_talkers=top_talkers,\r\n        top_destinations=top_destinations,\r\n        top_ports=top_ports,\r\n        active_flow_peaks=active_flow_peaks,\r\n        latency_percentiles=latency_percentiles,\r\n    )\r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Fri\, 06 Mar 2026 01:24:07 GMT
Set-Cookie: REDACTED
Vary: Origin
```

```
{}
```

### SIGNATURE ###
```
http:host is localhost
http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-
http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "netprof/report/summary_builder.py", "3:LEN": "\"\"\"Build summary.json from flows and transactions.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom collections import defaultdict\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.summary import (\r\n    LatencyPercentiles,\r\n    Summary,\r\n    TopDestination,\r\n    TopTalker,\r\n)\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _percentile(sorted_values: list[float], p: float) -> float | None:\r\n    if not sorted_values:\r\n        return None\r\n    k = (len(sorted_values) - 1) * p / 100.0\r\n    f = int(k)\r\n    c = f + 1 if f + 1 < len(sorted_values) else f\r\n    return (\r\n        sorted_values[f] + (k - f) * (sorted_values[c] - sorted_values[f])\r\n        if c > f\r\n        else sorted_values[f]\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_summary(\r\n    flows: list[Flow],\r\n    transactions: list[Transaction],\r\n    top_talkers_n: int = 10,\r\n    top_destinations_n: int = 10,\r\n    top_ports_n: int = 10,\r\n) -> Summary:\r\n    \"\"\"Compute aggregate stats from flows and transactions.\"\"\"\r\n    total_flows = len(flows)\r\n    total_bytes = sum(f.bytes_client_to_server + f.bytes_server_to_client for f in flows)\r\n    total_transactions = len(transactions)\r\n\r\n    # Top talkers: by IP, aggregate bytes sent/recv (as client or server)\r\n    ip_bytes_sent: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    ip_bytes_recv: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        ip_bytes_sent[f.client_ip] += f.bytes_client_to_server\r\n        ip_bytes_recv[f.client_ip] += f.bytes_server_to_client\r\n        ip_bytes_sent[f.server_ip] += f.bytes_server_to_client\r\n        ip_bytes_recv[f.server_ip] += f.bytes_client_to_server\r\n    talkers = [\r\n        TopTalker(ip=ip, bytes_sent=ip_bytes_sent[ip], bytes_recv=ip_bytes_recv[ip])\r\n        for ip in sorted(set(ip_bytes_sent) | set(ip_bytes_recv))\r\n    ]\r\n    talkers.sort(key=lambda t: t.bytes_sent + t.bytes_recv, reverse=True)\r\n    top_talkers = talkers[:top_talkers_n]\r\n\r\n    # Top destinations: server endpoint (server_ip:port), bytes_sent to it, flow_count\r\n    dest_bytes: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    dest_flows: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        key = f\"{f.server_ip}:{f.server_port}\"\r\n        dest_bytes[key] += f.bytes_client_to_server\r\n        dest_flows[key] += 1\r\n    dests = [\r\n        TopDestination(target=k, bytes_sent=dest_bytes[k], flow_count=dest_flows[k])\r\n        for k in sorted(dest_bytes.keys())\r\n    ]\r\n    dests.sort(key=lambda d: d.bytes_sent, reverse=True)\r\n    top_destinations = dests[:top_destinations_n]\r\n\r\n    # Top ports: destination port, count of flows\r\n    port_count: dict[int, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        port_count[f.server_port] += 1\r\n    top_ports = [\r\n        {\"port\": p, \"count\": port_count[p]}\r\n        for p in sorted(port_count.keys(), key=lambda p: -port_count[p])[:top_ports_n]\r\n    ]\r\n\r\n    # Active flow peaks: max concurrent in any bucket\r\n    active_flow_peaks = 0\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        if f.concurrency_timeline:\r\n            for _ts, count in f.concurrency_timeline:\r\n                if count > active_flow_peaks:\r\n                    active_flow_peaks = count\r\n\r\n    # Latency percentiles from transactions with latency_ms\r\n    latencies = [t.latency_ms for t in transactions if t.latency_ms is not None]\r\n    latencies.sort()\r\n    p50 = _percentile(latencies, 50)\r\n    p90 = _percentile(latencies, 90)\r\n    p99 = _percentile(latencies, 99)\r\n    latency_percentiles = LatencyPercentiles(p50_ms=p50, p90_ms=p90, p99_ms=p99)\r\n\r\n    return Summary(\r\n        total_flows=total_flows,\r\n        total_bytes=total_bytes,\r\n        total_transactions=total_transactions,\r\n        top_talkers=top_talkers,\r\n        top_destinations=top_destinations,\r\n        top_ports=top_ports,\r\n        active_flow_peaks=active_flow_peaks,\r\n        latency_percentiles=latency_percentiles,\r\n    )\r\n", "4:VARINT": 2}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile
```

REDACTED"],"Connect-Protocol-Version":["1"],"Connection":["close"],"Content-Encoding":["gzip"],"Content-Type":["application/proto"],"Cookie":["REDACTED"],"Host":["api2.cursor.sh"],"Traceparent":["REDACTED"],"User-Agent":["connect-es/1.6.1"],"X-Amzn-Trace-Id":["REDACTED"],"X-Client-Key":["REDACTED"],"X-Cursor-Checksum":["REDACTED"],"X-Cursor-Client-Arch":["x64"],"X-Cursor-Client-Device-Type":["desktop"],"X-Cursor-Client-Os":["win32"],"X-Cursor-Client-Type":["ide"],"X-Cursor-Client-Version":["2.6.12"],"X-Cursor-Config-Version":["REDACTED"],"X-Cursor-Streaming":["true"],"X-Cursor-Timezone":["REDACTED"],"X-Fs-Client-Key":["REDACTED"],"X-Ghost-Mode":["true"],"X-New-Onboarding-Completed":["false"],"X-Request-Id":["REDACTED"],"X-Session-Id":["REDACTED"]},"bodyBase64":"REDACTED"},"res":{"contentType":"application/proto","statusCode":200,"statusMessage":"200
